rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal values. Elec. Code §254.262 governs campaign travel expense reporting. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A direct campaign expenditure consisting of personal travel expenses incurred by a person may be made without complying with Section 254.261.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict analysis applicable.
